corpus.researchSummary: Ramp is a spend management platform combining cards, expenses, bill pay, procurement, and finance automation for businesses.

evidence.quote: Ramp describes its platform as helping businesses control spend.
Ramp markets corporate cards as part of the spend management platform.
Ramp bill pay centralizes vendor payments and approvals.
Ramp expense management helps teams submit, approve, and reconcile expenses.
Ramp procurement helps companies manage purchase intake and approvals.
Ramp pricing pages describe plan options for the product.
Ramp positions finance automation for businesses and their finance teams.
Ramp combines cards, expenses, bill pay, procurement, and reporting workflows.
